buy.confirmDescription: Your purchase has been initiated. Transfer the amount with the provided reference code.
buy.howMuch: How much do you want to buy?
buy.selectAsset: What do you want to buy?
buy.title: Buy
buy.transfer: Transfer this amount with the reference code. Your crypto arrives in your wallet once payment is received.

email.codeHint: We sent a 6-digit code to {{mail}}. Enter it below to confirm the address.
email.sendError: Could not send code. Please try again.
email.successBody: Your email address {{mail}} is now linked to your DFX profile.
email.title: Email
email.verifyError: Code incorrect or expired. Please try again.

hardware.connectDescription: Connect your BitBox02 via USB or scan for BitBox02 Nova via Bluetooth.
hardware.connectDescriptionIos: Scan for your BitBox02 Nova via Bluetooth.

kyc.completeDescription: Your identity verification is being reviewed.
kyc.title: KYC Verification

legal.accept: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Disclaimer.
legal.title: Legal Information

backup.alertBody: We'll create a {{required}}-of-{{total}} vault. Make sure all co-signers are available before continuing.
backup.body: Three short steps so you never lose access — even if a phone breaks or someone forgets a PIN.
backup.confirm: I understand: without enough co-signers my crypto won't move.
backup.item1Desc: Print or write down the recovery sheet — same as a normal wallet, but each co-signer keeps their own copy.
backup.item2Desc: Pick a safe place: home safe, bank deposit box, or a trusted family member.
backup.item3Desc: Tell each co-signer what the vault is for and how many signatures it needs.
backup.title: Last step: backup

concept.analogyBody: Imagine three keys to a safe holding your crypto. The safe only opens when at least two of the three keys are inserted at the same time.
concept.analogyTitle: Like a safe with three keys
concept.body: A multi-signature wallet is shared by several people. To send your crypto, the minimum number of people you agreed on has to approve the transaction together.
concept.exampleCaption: Example: you, your partner, and a backup person share the wallet. As soon as two of you approve, your crypto is sent.
concept.title: How it works

cosigners.body: Add the wallet addresses of the people who should co-sign with you ({{count}} more needed).
cosigners.hint: Co-signers can be a family member, a hardware wallet you keep elsewhere, or a trusted friend. They each receive a request when you want to send your crypto.
cosigners.title: Who signs with you?
cosigners.youDesc: Your DFX Wallet on this device.

manage.emptyBody: You currently have no multi-signature vault. Set one up to secure your crypto together with family, partner, or team.
manage.removeBody: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"? The configuration will be deleted.
manage.youDesc: Your DFX Wallet on this device

intro.body: Protect your wallet with two or more signatures. Your crypto only moves when enough people agree — no single phone, password, or person can be a single point of failure.
intro.bullet1: Sleep easier: even a stolen phone alone can't drain your wallet.
intro.bullet2: Share responsibility with family or your team without sharing one password.
intro.bullet3: Recover access if one device is lost — the others still work.
intro.title: More security with Multi-Signature

quorum.body: Pick how many signatures are needed and how many co-signers there are. 2-of-3 is the most popular choice — secure, but still recoverable if one key is lost.
quorum.option_2_2_desc: Both signatures always required. Highest security but no recovery if one key is lost.
quorum.option_2_3_desc: Recommended. Two of three signatures send your crypto. Lose one device — the other two still work.
quorum.option_3_5_desc: Stricter quorum for organisations. Three of five signatures sign each transaction.
quorum.option_custom_desc: Set signatures and co-signers yourself — from 1-of-2 up to bespoke setups with 9 people.
quorum.title: Pick your setup

success.body: Your {{required}}-of-{{total}} vault is ready. From now on, every send needs the agreed number of signatures.
success.nextBody: Send funds into the vault to start using it. Each co-signer will get a signing request when you want to spend.
success.title: Vault active

onboarding.createError: Could not create wallet. Please try again.
onboarding.invalidSeed: Invalid seed phrase. Must be 12 or 24 words.
onboarding.restoreError: Could not restore wallet. Please try again.
onboarding.subtitle: Buy and sell crypto directly with your wallet
onboarding.title: Welcome to DFX

passkey.backupWarning: You can export your recovery phrase later in Settings. This is recommended as a backup in case you lose access to your passkey.
passkey.createDescription: Your wallet will be secured by a passkey stored in your device's secure element. No seed phrase to write down.
passkey.createError: Failed to create passkey. Please try again.
passkey.prfUnsupported: Your passkey provider does not support the required encryption feature (PRF). Third-party providers like Bitwarden do not support this yet. Please use {{provider}} as your passkey provider instead.
passkey.restoreDescription: Use your existing passkey to restore your wallet. The same passkey will derive the same wallet.
passkey.restoreError: Failed to restore wallet from passkey. Please try again.
passkey.restoreInfo: Make sure you are using the same passkey that was used to create the wallet. If your passkey was synced via iCloud or Google, it should be available on this device.
passkey.step1: A passkey is created and stored securely on your device.
passkey.step2: Your wallet keys are derived from the passkey.
passkey.step3: No seed phrase to write down — your passkey is your key.

pay.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to scan QR codes.
pay.comingSoonMessage: Payments are not yet available. Scanned: {{data}}

pin.createDescription: Choose a 6-digit PIN to secure your wallet.
pin.saveError: Could not save PIN. Please try again.
pin.tooMany: Too many failed attempts. Please restart the app.

portfolio.emptyDescription: Buy your first crypto to get started.

receive.buyFromBankSubtitle: Top up via DFX SEPA transfer
receive.selectAsset: What do you want to receive?
receive.onlyCorrectNetwork: Only send {{asset}} on the {{network}} network to this address.
receive.title: Receive

seedExport.deriveFailed: Failed to derive recovery phrase from passkey. Please try again.
seedExport.descriptionPasskey: Authenticate with your passkey to reveal your recovery phrase. Write it down and store it in a safe place as a backup.
seedExport.descriptionSeed: Your recovery phrase is the only way to recover your wallet. Keep it safe and never share it.
seedExport.warning: Never share your recovery phrase. Anyone with these words can access your wallet.

sell.bankDescription: Enter the IBAN where the payout should arrive.
sell.howMuch: How much do you want to sell?
sell.noBalance: No holdings to sell — top up your wallet first.
sell.selectAsset: What do you want to sell?
sell.title: Sell
sell.transferHint: Send the exact amount to the deposit address. The payout arrives in your bank account once the transaction is confirmed.

send.irreversible: Transactions are irreversible. Please verify the recipient address and amount.
send.selectAsset: What do you want to send?
send.sendToBankSubtitle: Cash out via DFX SEPA / SWIFT payout
send.title: Send

settings.deleteWalletConfirm: This will permanently remove your wallet from this device. Make sure you have backed up your seed phrase.
settings.deleteWalletConfirmPasskey: This will permanently remove your wallet from this device. If you need to restore it, you will need your passkey or your exported recovery phrase. Please also delete the passkey from your device settings.
settings.title: Settings

wallets.helper: Linking an additional wallet requires you to sign a message with the private key of that address. You stay logged in with your original address afterwards.
wallets.intro: Here you can see which of your wallet addresses are linked to your DFX profile. Link additional addresses so DFX treats them as the same account.
wallets.title: DFX wallets
